sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) an upper chamber, a loft on the roof of a house; ὑπερῷον, Söller, Erker. (Arabic عِلِّيَّةُ, عُلِّيَّةُ.) Jud. 3:23 , 25 Jdg 3:25 1Ki 17:19, 23 1Ki 17:23 2Ki 4:10. Poet. used of heaven, Psa 104:3, 13 Psa 104:13.

(2) a ladder, ascent by steps, by which one went up to the temple, 2Ch 9:4.
